pr.title: Push Master Control Migration
pr.rollback: Revert PR to restore prior nav reminders behavior and account push CTA.

receipt.goal: Make top-nav Reminders the real browser push master on/off control, move /account to status + manage link, and send info icon to /family#reminders.
verification_steps: Nav reminders switch ON requests/uses OneSignal and reaches enabled only with real push subscription
Nav reminders switch OFF performs OneSignal opt-out and reflects disabled
/account displays status + manage reminders link only
